title: Make subitems invisible to publicly shared board viewers
excerpt:

posts.author: gero.camp (Gero Camp)
posts.cookedHtml:
We evaluate incoming applications by creating individual subitems including ratings and comments to every applicant which then are supposed to be published to the community via a publicly shared board link.

As the comments and ratings are confidential it would be nice to make subitems (including our comments and ratings) invisible to public board viewers.
